2605.18032.title: PROTEA: Offline Evaluation and Iterative Refinement for Multi-Agent LLM Workflows
2605.18032.paper_summary: Multi-agent LLM workflows -- systems composed of multiple role-specific LLM calls -- often outperform single-prompt baselines, but they remain difficult to debug and refine. Failures can originate from subtle errors in intermediate outputs that propagate to downstream nodes, requiring developers to inspect long traces and infer which agent to modify. We present PROTEA, a unified interface for offline, test-driven improvement of multi-agent workflows. PROTEA executes a workflow, scores intermediate node outputs with configurable rubrics, and overlays per-node states and rationales on the workflow graph to localize likely bottlenecks. To support complex systems where final-answer references are the primary supervision, PROTEA performs backward node evaluation: it generates candidate node-level expectations from final-answer references and graph context, then compares them with observed node outputs. For selected nodes, PROTEA presents targeted prompt revisions as editable before/after comparisons, then automatically reruns and re-evaluates the workflow to show output changes and score trajectories within the same interface. In two production-adjacent workflows, PROTEA improved document-inspection accuracy from 64.3% to 83.9% and recommendation Hit@5 from 0.30 to 0.38. In a formative study with six experienced LLM developers, participants valued graph-level localization, per-node rationales, and editable before/after prompt revisions.
2605.18032.paper_summary_zh: 多代理 LLM 工作流程——由多個角色特定的 LLM 調用組成的系統——通常表現優於單一提示基準，但它們仍然難以調試和改進。失敗可能源於中間輸出中的微妙錯誤，這些錯誤會傳播到下游節點，要求開發者檢查長長的追蹤並推斷需要修改的代理。我們提出了 PROTEA，這是一個統一的界面，用於離線、測試驅動的多代理工作流程改進。PROTEA 執行工作流程，使用可配置的標準對中間節點輸出進行評分，並在工作流程圖上疊加每個節點的狀態和理由，以定位可能的瓶頸。為了支持最終答案參考作為主要監督的複雜系統，PROTEA 進行反向節點評估：它從最終答案參考和圖形上下文生成候選節點級期望，然後將其與觀察到的節點輸出進行比較。對於選定的節點，PROTEA 以可編輯的前後比較形式呈現針對性的提示修訂，然後自動重新運行和重新評估工作流程，以顯示輸出變化和在同一界面內的分數軌跡。在兩個接近生產的工作流程中，PROTEA 將文件檢查準確率從 64.3% 提高到 83.9%，推薦的 Hit@5 從 0.30 提高到 0.38。在與六位經驗豐富的 LLM 開發者進行的形成性研究中，參與者重視圖形級定位、每個節點的理由和可編輯的前後提示修訂。
2605.18032.author: Kazuki Kawamura et.al.
2605.18032.authors: Kazuki Kawamura, Satoshi Waki, Kei Tateno
